description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single stage called build and a job named job that runs on a Windows runner. In the build stage the job should execute the following script commands in order: echo "Restoring NuGet Packages...", then run C:\Users\NIKIGAN\Desktop\NuGet\nuget.exe restore "StringsItE.sln", then echo "Release build...", then invoke MSBuild via "C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft Visual Studio\2017\Community\MSBuild\15.0\Bin\MSBuild.exe" with the flags /consoleloggerparameters:ErrorsOnly /maxcpucount /nologo /property:Configuration=Release /verbosity:quiet "StringsItE.sln". No Docker image, services, caches, artifacts, or rules are defined.
